title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Tama, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Unknown person #4 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't just sit here and do nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Out of the question!! Get back here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no telling now that she's out at sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have an update on the mysterious second dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An unbelievable sight is playing out in the skies above!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The two dragons are squaring off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Is being challenged by the pink dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I could turn into a monster like that,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would actually be useful to the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Dragon's identity is still unknown...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So Yamato must've been the one keeping Kaido-san busy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But there's no doubt it's hostile!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
